calendar.matters:
ASBESTOS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-26-2018 Off Calendar

ASBESTOS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-02-2017 Continued To Feb-01-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 503

Application For Entry Of Default Judgment Against Defendant Lorentzen Co.
Off Calendar Jan-05-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 514, Judge: Lynn O'Malley-Taylor, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Dustin M. Seesemann, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, ROBERT BERNICKY.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant LORENTZEN CO.
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:
IT IS ORDERED, ADJUDGED AND DECREED that the plaintiff shall recover damages from defendant LORENTZEN CO., in the amount of:

For Plaintiff, ROBERT BERNICKY $103,250.00 in Economic Damages,
For Plaintiff, ROBERT BERNICKY $750,000.00 in Non-Economic Damages,
Total Judgment of $853,250.00.

The Clerk is ordered to enter the judgment.
Judgment signed in open court.
